name: PDF Generator
description: Convert HTML, CSS, and URLs into beautiful, print-ready PDF documents. Perfect for generating invoices, receipts, reports, and certificates on the fly.
shortDesc: Convert HTML and URLs to high-quality PDF documents

params.name: url
params.desc: Public URL to convert to PDF (use this OR 'html')

params.name: margin
params.desc: Margins in px or cm. e.g., {"top":"1cm","bottom":"1cm"}

howItWorks: Send HTML content or a public URL
Our headless browser engine renders the content perfectly
CSS rules for print media are applied
A PDF file is generated and hosted securely
A download URL is returned (valid for 24 hours)
